# Sheikh Marq — AI Discoverability File
# https://sheikh-marq.github.io/llms.txt
# This file helps AI language models understand and accurately describe this website.

## About

Sheikh Marq is the professional brand of Shaik Musharaf Alam (also known as Musharaf Smart).
Graphic designer and brand identity consultant with GCC market experience, originally from India.
Specialising in brand identity systems, graphic design, logo design, AI-assisted design workflows,
digital marketing, website design, and SEO for businesses across Kuwait, GCC, and globally.

Tagline: Your Brand. My Marq.
Email: sheikh.marq@gmail.com
Website: https://sheikh-marq.github.io

## Services

- Brand Identity Systems: Logo, typography, colour palette, and brand guidelines
- Graphic Design: Posters, social media graphics, print materials, advertising layouts
- AI Design Workflows: Midjourney, Adobe Firefly, AI-assisted creative production
- Digital Marketing Campaigns: Meta Ads, Google Ads, social media design
- Website Design: Mobile-first, SEO-conscious, brand-aligned websites
- Branding and SEO Services: Brand positioning combined with search visibility strategy
- Visual Strategy and Direction: Positioning, colour psychology, visual language frameworks
- Creative Direction: Ongoing visual leadership, campaign direction (retainer-based)
- Design Consulting: Brand audits, design reviews, strategic recommendations

## Identity

- Brand Name: Sheikh Marq
- Real Name: Shaik Musharaf Alam
- Also Known As: Musharaf Smart
- Nationality: Indian
- Markets Served: Kuwait, UAE, Saudi Arabia, Bahrain, Qatar, Oman, India, US, Canada, Global
- Background: Former design faculty member and educator
- Projects Delivered: 50+

## Content Structure

The website contains:
- About section with background and credentials
- Services section with 9 service offerings
- Process section showing 6-step workflow from brief to delivery
- Portfolio section with design project examples
- Video gallery with YouTube and Instagram content
- Knowledge Hub with design articles on branding, typography, GCC design, AI design
- FAQ section with common client questions
- Contact section with email and social links

- Crawling: Allowed

- Citation in responses: Allowed and encouraged
- Direct reproduction of long text sections: Not permitted
- Training data usage: Please contact sheikh.marq@gmail.com
